allow: Bash(python -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'human': msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\): content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 50: print\(content[:300]\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text' and len\(c.get\('text',''\)\) > 50: print\(c['text'][:300]\) except: pass ")
